description: Sequential gated diagnostic CHECK 2: whole-domain structure audit on same test samples (theta=180,150,120,90,60,30,10, sample_idx=0, res=512)

metrics.r: mean Pearson r over all free pixels (aggregate.mean_r_free_all)
metrics.std_ratio: mean std_ratio_away_pct over samples (pred_std/gt_std in away region, percent)

notes: modes32 does not show meaningfully better correlation than baseline (0.418 vs 0.445); slightly worse.
reduced_capacity has highest away-region pred range (0.32) and std_ratio (35.4%) but similar r (0.437).
All three checkpoints show weak whole-domain correlation (r~0.42-0.45) and narrow pred range vs GT.
CHECK 3 skipped: CHECK 2 conclusive that capacity sweeps do not fix whole-domain structure.
